articles.title: Filippi says goodbye to Milan, but will not follow Allegri to Napoli: his future will be at Fiorentina
articles.summary: In the past few hours, Claudio Filippi announced his farewell to Milan after just one year. However, the goalkeeping coach will not follow Massimiliano Allegri to Napoli, but will continue his career at Fiorentina.

articles.title: Under 15 Women, Milan also beat Fiorentina in the return match and reached the final against Roma
articles.summary: The Milan Under 15 Women won the Scudetto final of their championship after eliminating Fiorentina in the semi-final: this morning the Rossonere, who had already won the first leg 5-2, beat Viola Park 3-1.
